feed.title: GTFS Scorecard: feed quality changes
feed.subtitle: Transit agencies whose GTFS data quality grade or score moved since their last check.

entry.title: Williamsburg Area Transit Authority: score fell 1.2 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Williamsburg Area Transit Authority's GTFS data quality went from 59.8 (F) to 58.6 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Washington Park Shuttle: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Washington Park Shuttle's GTFS data quality went from 60.2 (D) to 59.8 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Vermont Translines: grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Vermont Translines's GTFS data quality went from 70.2 (C) to 69.8 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Vermont Translines: grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Vermont Translines's GTFS data quality went from 70.2 (C) to 69.8 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority (VTA): grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority (VTA)'s GTFS data quality went from 70.1 (C) to 69.7 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Static feed for realtime: grade improved F to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Static feed for realtime's GTFS data quality went from 59.7 (F) to 66.7 (D). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: Rogue Valley Transportation District (RVTD): grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Rogue Valley Transportation District (RVTD)'s GTFS data quality went from 66.0 (D) to 56.1 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: RADAR: grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, RADAR's GTFS data quality went from 70.1 (C) to 69.7 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, RADAR's GTFS data quality went from 70.1 (C) to 69.7 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Quail Trail Public Transit's GTFS data quality went from 80.2 (B) to 79.8 (C). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: NYC Ferry: score rose 1.4 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, NYC Ferry's GTFS data quality went from 83.9 (B) to 85.3 (B). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: Massport: grade dropped A to B
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Massport's GTFS data quality went from 90.4 (A) to 90.0 (B). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Greater Portland Metro Bus: score rose 1.2 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Greater Portland Metro Bus's GTFS data quality went from 51.3 (F) to 52.5 (F). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: Frederick County TransIT: grade improved F to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-06, Frederick County TransIT's GTFS data quality went from 59.9 (F) to 60.6 (D). A step in the right direction.
